currency_note: USD via PayPal or Ko-fi (international clients) | PHP via GCash, Maya, or Bank Transfer QR PH (Philippine clients)
gcash_disclaimer: GCash and local PHP prices are set lower to reflect the actual amount received after PayPal transaction fees and withdrawal deductions.

doodle_pages.note: Doodle pages are multi-pose illustrations on a single canvas.

addons.note: All add-ons apply per character unless otherwise stated.

qualifies: Intricate or heavily layered outfits (armor, lots of accessories, straps, buckles, chains)
Multiple patterns or textures (plaid, scales, lace, embroidery)
Non-human or hybrid features (wings, multiple limbs, unusual anatomy)
Highly detailed or elaborate hairstyles (complex braids, voluminous curls, decorative hairpieces)
Large-area markings, tattoos, or body paint
Multiple props or held items as part of the default design
Lots of small design elements (buckles, straps, chains, badges, patches)

Additional Character.applies: Per additional character beyond the first

Additional Revision (beyond 2 free).applies: Per revision round, not per character

commercial_use_includes: Selling physical or digital merchandise (prints, stickers, clothing, etc.)
Business branding, logos, or promotional materials
Monetized content (YouTube, Twitch, paid social media posts)
Licensing or sublicensing the artwork to a third party
commercial_use_excludes: Personal use as profile picture or wallpaper
Sharing on personal social media with proper credit

NSFW Fee.note: Applied on top of all other fees. Non-negotiable.

ko_fi_listing_addons.listing_name: April 2026 Supporter Special — Colored Sketch Doodle Page
ko_fi_listing_addons.base_includes: 1 Full Body, 2 Half Bodies, 1 Chibi Full Body (Colored Sketch)
ko_fi_listing_addons.addon_note: Add-ons apply per character. If multiple characters are included, each is assessed individually.

Outfit Variation (same character, differ.note: Adds an extra full body to the doodle page in the alternative outfit. Page becomes: 2 Full Bodies, 2 Half Bodies, 1 Chibi Full Body.

custom_commission_pricing.note: Custom commissions involve designing a character's appearance from scratch or adapting a client's real-life likeness. Accepted case-by-case.

bundle_pricing_logic.Front + Back view: +50% of base (same pose mirrored, less design work)
bundle_pricing_logic.Alternative Outfit: +65% of base (new outfit must be designed and rendered)
bundle_pricing_logic.Alternative Form Non-Human: +90% of base (non-human anatomy requires significantly more creative work)

custom_fees.Original Character / Persona Design: Varies — discussed before work begins (approx. ₱500 to ₱800 based on complexity)
custom_fees.Outfit / Persona Adaptation: Reduced fee when IRL photo or partial reference is provided (approx. ₱400)
custom_fees.Additional Props: Assessed per order — only charged if props significantly increase workload

payment_terms.above_threshold: 50% downpayment before work begins, remaining 50% due upon completion before final file delivery
payment_terms.installment_plans: Available for fully-rendered illustrations, character reference sheets, profile banners, and large-scale projects only. Terms discussed prior to payment.

turnaround_time.Rush Delivery: 3 business days (+$30 / ₱520, paid upfront, subject to availability)
turnaround_time.note: TAT may vary depending on character complexity, number of characters, and current queue position.

revisions.note: Minor color tweaks and small fixes are free at appropriate workflow stages. Major changes after the coloring phase may incur additional fees.

1KSPECIAL April 2026.description: Discounted base prices for the April 2026 milestone promo
1KSPECIAL April 2026.example: Full Body Colored Sketch discounted to ₱450 (from ₱600)

loyalty_card_milestones.1: Welcome: 15% off next order (code issued on first completed commission)
loyalty_card_milestones.2: Free rendering upgrade (1 tier up, e.g. Sketch to Colored Sketch)
loyalty_card_milestones.3: Free Sketch Icon (500x500px) added to next order
loyalty_card_milestones.5: 20% off next commission (any size or style)
loyalty_card_milestones.7: Free Colored Sketch Bust Up added to next order
loyalty_card_milestones.8: Priority queue access on next order
loyalty_card_milestones.10: Free SR Half Body + permanent 10% loyal client rate on all future orders
